steps.title: Identify the core demand
steps.content: The student wants to specify the fanner basket's name in Choctaw. The notes provide this information: ufko tapushik.

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer
steps.content:
B accomplishes the goal by stating “is called an ufko tapushik in Choctaw,” which directly provides the fanner basket's Choctaw name.

The other choices either omit the Choctaw name entirely (A, C) or shift focus to the archive's name instead (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
